summary: RanchoPro Iteration 2 comprehensive test - New features validated. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features working correctly. Key findings: Alerts system fully functional, NDVI satellite view working with Esri tiles, offline sync implemented, AI completely removed from backend API, NO AI features in frontend UI. Minor frontend navigation issue during testing but all screens verified working via direct URLs.

issues: Deprecated warning: 'shadow*' style props should use 'boxShadow' (same as iteration 1)
Deprecated warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'
Non-critical React Native web deprecation warnings

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ AI endpoint /api/ai/predict completely removed - returns 404 as expected
✓ Rule-based alerts system implemented correctly with proper severity levels (alta, media, baja)
✓ Alert types validated: vacunacion_pendiente, parto_proximo, potrero_saturado, pasto_deteriorado, revision_pendiente
✓ NDVI endpoint returns proper data structure with ndvi_value in valid range (-1 to 1)
✓ NDVI recommendations based on grass_status and capacity usage
✓ Offline sync endpoint accepts multiple operation types (create_animal, create_paddock, create_finance, create_health)
✓ Frontend Dashboard shows Alertas Urgentes section with notification badge - NO AI features
✓ Alertas screen has 4 severity filters (Todas, Urgentes, Media, Baja) working correctly
✓ Potreros screen has 3 view modes: List, Map (OpenStreetMap), NDVI (Esri satellite tiles)
✓ NDVI satellite view shows proper banner 'Vista Satelital NDVI - Salud del Pasto'
✓ Perfil screen shows sync controls: connection status, last sync time, sync button, clear cache
✓ Perfil shows 'Motor de alertas: Basado en reglas (sin costo)' - confirms zero cost
✓ NO AI tools section in Perfil screen
✓ All environment variables properly used (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, session tokens)
✓ Spanish UI maintained throughout all new features
seed_data_creation: Test session token: test_session_v2_1772786924 for user: test_user_v2. Data already seeded with 9 animals, 4 paddocks. Alert system generated 15 alerts including vaccination pending, calving alerts, and paddock health warnings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All NEW features fully tested and working. Backend API tests cover alerts, NDVI, offline sync, and AI removal. Frontend tests validated all UI changes: alerts section on dashboard, alertas screen with filters, potreros 3 view modes (list/map/NDVI satellite), perfil sync controls. Test credentials: session_token='test_session_v2_1772786924', user='test_user_v2'. AI completely removed from both backend and frontend.

coverage: Alert structure validation - severity, types, fields
GET /api/ndvi - returns NDVI data for paddocks
NDVI data structure validation - ndvi_value range, grass_status, recommendations

ai_removal_verification.backend: ✓ CONFIRMED - /api/ai/predict returns 404. No AI endpoints exist. Dashboard has no AI fields.
ai_removal_verification.frontend: ✓ CONFIRMED - NO AI button on dashboard. NO AI section in Perfil. Perfil shows 'Motor de alertas: Basado en reglas (sin costo)' confirming zero-cost rule-based system.

ndvi_integration_status: ✓ CONFIRMED - NDVI satellite view implemented using Esri ArcGIS satellite tiles. NDVI values derived from grass_status (bueno=0.75, regular=0.45, malo=0.2). Color-coded overlay with recommendations visible. Banner shows 'Vista Satelital NDVI - Salud del Pasto'.
offline_sync_status: ✓ CONFIRMED - Sync endpoint accepts operations queue. Frontend shows connection status (Conectado/Sin conexión), last sync time, sync button, and clear cache controls. Tested with create_animal, create_paddock, create_finance operations.
alerts_system_status: ✓ CONFIRMED - Rule-based alerts system generating alerts for: vaccination pending (>180 days), calving within 30 days, paddock overcrowding, bad grass status, no health check >90 days. Dashboard shows top 3 urgent alerts. Alertas screen shows all 15 alerts with severity filters working.
spanish_ui_compliance: ✓ 100% COMPLIANT - All new features in Spanish: 'Alertas Urgentes', 'Ver todas las alertas', 'Sincronización y Datos', 'Conectado', 'Sincronizar Ahora', 'Limpiar caché local', 'Vista Satelital NDVI', 'Basado en reglas (sin costo)'
